indicators.name: A-Share Blue Chips (CSI 300)
indicators.insight: 510300 tracks the CSI 300 — China's 300 largest A-share companies. Its trend gives the clearest read on institutional sentiment toward onshore blue chips.

indicators.name: ChiNext Growth
indicators.insight: 159915 tracks ChiNext — China's growth and technology board. High-beta relative to the CSI 300; its spread signals risk appetite for domestic growth names.

indicators.name: Mid/Small-Cap Breadth (CSI 500)
indicators.insight: 510500 tracks the CSI 500 — mid-to-small A-share companies. Breadth here signals whether the rally has legs beyond the top-cap concentration.

indicators.name: Duration / Rates (CGB ETF)
indicators.insight: 511010 tracks 10-year Chinese government bonds. Rising price means falling yields — a flight-to-safety or PBOC easing signal that compresses the equity risk premium.

indicators.name: Credit Appetite (Conv. Bond ETF)
indicators.insight: 511380 tracks convertible bonds — a hybrid instrument sensitive to both credit spreads and equity volatility. Its trend is a leading read on risk-on/risk-off in domestic credit markets.
